nodes.label: NPTEL IIT Roorkee Principles and Application of Building Science
nodes.norm_label: nptel iit roorkee principles and application of building science

nodes.label: Lomos Archilabs Rhino and Grasshopper Certification
nodes.norm_label: lomos archilabs rhino and grasshopper certification

nodes.label: Floating Self Sufficient Community
nodes.rationale: Designed to rehabilitate people from the islands of Lakshadweep starting with Minicoy due to global warming impacts on sea levels and to improve the natural habitat of islands.

nodes.label: Premium Residential High-Rise Hyderabad
nodes.rationale: Concept designed with context in mind, maximizing views of natural contours and the river in front of the site; built over a three-floor podium parking with high-end amenities.

nodes.label: Commercial Office Space Chennai (3.35 acres)
nodes.rationale: First flagship IT/ITES commercial infrastructure project in Chennai; facade inspired by the stone lattices of Chola temples due to the client's association with Tamil Nadu.

nodes.label: Commercial Office Space Chennai (12.67 acres)
nodes.rationale: Large scale IT park on a southwest-facing site requiring hard measures to reduce solar heat gain and achieve a seamless design strategy.

nodes.label: Corporate Office Interior Trivandrum
nodes.rationale: International insurance company headquarters pitch emphasizing social inclusivity; two design directions proposed: Scandinavian openness/calmness and local cultural integration.

nodes.label: Residential Tower Amenities Delhi
nodes.rationale: Haute Modernism concept blending modernism with traditional detailing, using bold elements humbled by intricate details and high-quality metallic PVDF-coated elements.

nodes.label: Modular Wallet
nodes.rationale: Product design inspired by the sustainable aspect of carrying only the necessary; designed, outsourced, implemented and sold.

nodes.label: Hexagonal Floating Structures
nodes.rationale: Hexagonal floating structures were designed to be modular and repetitive to improve mass scaling of the floating community concept.

nodes.label: Modular Design
nodes.rationale: Used across the floating community project to enable mass scaling, precast construction, and fast-paced transportation.

nodes.label: Aerodynamic Form
nodes.rationale: An aerodynamic form was chosen and validated through SIMSCALE virtual wind tunnel analysis to tackle heavy ocean wind loads; narrow slit openings inspired by clerestories create downward force for better wind circulation.

nodes.label: Eco-Mooring
nodes.rationale: Anchor systems were designed as a hybrid organic eco-mooring integrated with biorock wireframes to improve longevity and trigger coral growth.

nodes.label: Biorock Wireframes
nodes.rationale: Integrated with eco-mooring systems to trigger coral growth and improve anchor longevity.

nodes.label: Coral Growth
nodes.rationale: Promoted by biorock wireframes around eco-mooring anchors as an ecological benefit.

nodes.label: Climate Regulated Greenhouses
nodes.rationale: Used in the cultivation zone of the floating community for controlled agriculture alongside fish and marketplace functions.

nodes.label: Podium Parking
nodes.rationale: Three-floor podium parking used in the Hyderabad residential high-rise to support high-end amenities and maximize views of natural contours and the river.

nodes.label: Chola Temple Stone Lattices
nodes.rationale: The Chennai commercial office facade drew subtle inspiration from the stone lattices of Chola temples due to the client's association with Tamil Nadu.

nodes.label: Staggered Massing
nodes.rationale: Used in the large IT park to reduce solar heat gain on the southwest-facing site.

nodes.label: Self Shading Fins
nodes.rationale: Incorporated into the large IT park facade to reduce solar heat gain on the southwest-facing site.

nodes.label: Intermediate Greenscapes
nodes.rationale: Integrated across floors and ground in the large IT park to create seamless green connections and pedestrian pathways.

nodes.label: Atrium Design
nodes.rationale: A massive atrium was used in the large IT park and the corporate interior to enhance light penetration and vertical connectivity.

nodes.label: Scandinavian Design
nodes.rationale: Proposed for the Trivandrum corporate office interior to convey openness and calmness aligned with the client's social wellbeing values.

nodes.label: Local Culture Integration
nodes.rationale: The second Trivandrum interior proposal sought to bring forth the local culture of the region to make the building unique to its location.

nodes.label: Haute Modernism
nodes.rationale: A design concept blending modernism with traditional detailing, using bold elements with intricate details and high-quality metallic PVDF-coated elements for the Delhi residential tower amenities.

nodes.label: Sustainable Design
nodes.rationale: Repeated theme across projects including floating community relocation due to sea level rise, climate-regulated greenhouses, solar heat reduction, and the modular wallet's carry-only-necessary approach.

nodes.label: Parametric Design
nodes.rationale: Implied by use of Rhino/Grasshopper and computer-generated mesh and steel gauge framing systems for accurate panel locations.
